title: Abhilashi University Date Sheet 2025 @ abhilashiuniversity.ac.in

detail.title: Abhilashi University Date Sheet 2025 @ abhilashiuniversity.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of Abhilashi University have released the Abhilashi University Date Sheet 2025 for BAMS. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: Abhilashi University Date Sheet 2025 is Out! The Abhilashi University has released the BAMS. Students can access their Abhilashi University Result 2025 using their registration number through the direct link here. For further updates on Abhilashi University, candidates can follow this page.

sections.heading: Important Details Abhilashi University Date Sheet 2025
How to Download the Abhilashi University Date Sheet 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download the Abhilashi University Date Sheet 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The University home page will open
The examination Schedules page will pop up
Date Sheet for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.

rows: Datesheet of Supplementary practical examination for BAMS 1st Prof to be held in month of October 2025
Date sheet for two year Vety Pharmacist training Course 2nd Year Annual examination(Theory & Practical) to be held in month of October 2025
Datesheet of BAMS 1st Prof (2023-24) Supplementary Examination (Theory) to be held in September-October 2025
Datesheet of BVSc & AH 1st Prof (2024-25) regular Examination (Theory) to be held in October 2025
